quality_notes: Inspected quickstart, compile, and manifest-schema pages plus corpus stats: 11 files, 2,978 lines, ~139.6K characters, and command-heavy Markdown with tables/code blocks. A single-shot Opus call should produce a credible high-level audit at this size, but coverage will likely be uneven on precise cross-page drift because it must hold the command set, 11 pages, inconsistencies, and edit proposals in one pass without iterative checking.
